<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ixekizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ixekizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Plaque psoriasisTaltz is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis in adults who are candidates for systemic therapy.Paediatric plaque psoriasisTaltz is indicated for the...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>spondyloarthropathy, susceptibility to（98.4%）</li>
<li>ankylosing spondylitis（97.6%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid vasculitis（97.5%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（97.3%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（97.1%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（97.1%）</li>
<li>hypermobility of coccyx（96.9%）</li>
<li>inflammatory spondylopathy（96.8%）</li>
<li>Kummell disease（96.7%）</li>
<li>polyarticular juvenile rheumatoid arthritis（96.4%）</li>
<li>vertebral disease（95.1%）</li>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（92.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid nodulosis（91.9%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis（91.7%）</li>
<li>juvenile idiopathic arthritis（91.7%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（91.6%）</li>
<li>Richter syndrome（91.4%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（91.3%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（91.2%）</li>
<li>juvenile chronic polyarthritis（91.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
